response.global_analysis: 1. JSON Match: Spoken dialogue matched the scene description for Scene 1, and the lyrics matched the reference lyrics perfectly for Scene 2. 2. JSON Usage: Fully used the provided reference lyrics and translations to ensure highly accurate, high-fidelity subtitling. 3. Timing & Pacing: Timestamps were matched with absolute precision to each character's voice pitch, using rapid-speech truncation to avoid overlapping subtitles.

subtitles.original: ねえ、私ダンスしようかな！
subtitles.english: Hey, maybe I'll dance!

subtitles.original: みんなと私の誕生日にお祝いダンスする！
subtitles.english: I'll do a celebration dance on my birthday!

subtitles.original: 誕生日じゃない、誕生日だけど誕生日じゃない！
subtitles.english: Wait, not birthday. Birthday, but not birthday!

subtitles.original: 誕生日じゃない日に。
subtitles.english: On an un-birthday.

subtitles.original: 非・誕生日。彼女は今「非・誕生」されてるから。
subtitles.english: Un-birthday. She's being un-birthed.

subtitles.original: でも... その言い方ちょっとヤバくない？
subtitles.english: But... that sounds so wrong!

subtitles.original: 今の発言はポッドキャスト用にとっておきなよ！
subtitles.english: Save that for the podcast, IRyS!

subtitles.original: でも踊ったら、ちょっとね...
subtitles.english: But after dancing, I am feeling a little...

subtitles.original: 暑い！ 暑くなってきた！脱いじゃう？
subtitles.english: Hot! It's getting hot! Is she gonna strip?

subtitles.original: うわー！BANされる！ それはマズいよ。
subtitles.english: Whoa! That's age-restricted! Maybe not.

subtitles.original: すぐ戻るからね！ 何を脱ぐ気なの？
subtitles.english: I'll be right back! What is she taking off?

subtitles.original: ズボン脱ぐの？ なんでズボンを脱ぐのよ、アイリス！
subtitles.english: Is she taking off her pants? Why pants, IRyS?!

subtitles.original: 一体何を考えてるの？
subtitles.english: What are you thinking about?

subtitles.original: もう、あなたを止めなきゃ。
subtitles.english: Alright, you need to be stopped.

subtitles.original: あ、戻ってきた？ おお。
subtitles.english: Oh, she's coming back? Oh.

subtitles.original: ジャジャーン！ おお、見て！
subtitles.english: Behold! Whoa, look at that!

subtitles.original: 上着脱いじゃった！ 超オシャレじゃん！
subtitles.english: I took off my jacket! You look so fancy!

subtitles.original: これでもう全部、アクセサリーが見えるでしょ？
subtitles.english: Now you can see all my accessories, right?

subtitles.original: カッコいい！ トゲトゲもいいね。
subtitles.english: Cool! I love the spikes too.

subtitles.original: あとアームカフも付けたんだよね。
subtitles.english: And I have an arm cuff now as well.

subtitles.original: おお、いいね！ カッコいい！
subtitles.english: Oh, nice! Cool!

subtitles.original: これで何の縛りもなくもっと踊れるよ！
subtitles.english: Now I can dance even more with no restrictions!

subtitles.original: さらにダイナミックになったね！ 動きやすい？
subtitles.english: She's even more dynamic! Is it easier to move?

subtitles.original: ツインテールも邪魔にならないしね。
subtitles.english: No pigtails to get in the way either.

subtitles.original: 腕の自由度が上がったね。
subtitles.english: More freedom for your arms.

subtitles.original: まあせっかくなのでね、こうやって集まったし...
subtitles.english: Well, since we're all here together...

subtitles.original: もう一曲一緒に歌うのはどうかな？
subtitles.english: How would you feel about doing one more song?

subtitles.original: いいね！ 体力ないけど頑張る！
subtitles.english: Okay! I don't have the energy, but I'll try!

subtitles.original: がんばれ、がんばれ！ いけるよ！
subtitles.english: Do your best, do your best! You can do it!

subtitles.original: というわけで、皆さんも準備はいいですか？
subtitles.english: That being said, are you all ready too?

subtitles.original: もう一つのパフォーマンスをお届けします！
subtitles.english: We're going to bring you another performance!

subtitles.original: 準備はいい？せーの...
subtitles.english: Are you ready? One, two...

subtitles.original: レッツゴー！
subtitles.english: Let's go!

subtitles.original: あじまう あじまう あじまーう！
subtitles.english: It's habbening, habbening, habbening!

subtitles.original: 宿題が全ッッ然終わらない、全国のヤバめな諸君！
subtitles.english: To all of ye in big, big trouble, 'cause your homework won't get done

subtitles.original: 時間がなければ眠らなきゃ良いじゃない
subtitles.english: If you're running outta time, you just gotta stay up all night
